business.name: Elite HVAC
business.serviceArea: Bainbridge Island & North Seattle — Ballard, Magnolia, Queen Anne, Fremont, Wallingford, Phinney Ridge, Green Lake
business.about: A modern climate-control studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. Heat pumps, furnaces, AC — properly load-calculated, cleanly installed, and backed by a ten-year labor warranty.

services.name: Heat Pump Install
services.description: Cold-climate heat pumps sized with a proper Manual J load calc and paired with your existing or new ductwork. We handle the permit, the PSE rebate paperwork, and the federal 25C tax credit documentation.

services.name: Furnace Install
services.description: High-efficiency gas or electric furnace installed clean — old unit hauled, new unit commissioned, gas lines tested. Two-stage and modulating options for quiet, even heat.

services.name: AC / Cooling Install
services.description: Central air sized to your home, not to your square footage. We evaluate ducts, seal leaks, and install equipment that won't short-cycle itself to death in the PNW shoulder seasons.

services.name: Ductless Mini-Split
services.description: Single- and multi-zone heat pumps for additions, ADUs, home offices, or full-home retrofits where ductwork isn't an option. Mitsubishi and Fujitsu hyper-heat.

services.name: Maintenance Plan
services.description: Two seasonal tune-ups, priority repair pricing, and a discount on parts. Keeps efficiency up and manufacturer warranty valid.

services.name: Emergency Repair
services.description: On-site diagnosis within hours. Flat-rate repair quotes before a wrench turns. No-heat calls prioritized during cold snaps.

testimonials.name: Katherine B.
testimonials.text: Heat died during the December cold snap. They had a tech at my door in under three hours, diagnosed it, and had the replacement parts on the truck. Warm by dinner.

testimonials.name: Paul M.
testimonials.text: Our old gas furnace was 25 years old. They walked me through the heat-pump rebates I didn't know existed — ended up saving nearly $6,000 after PSE and the federal tax credit.

testimonials.name: Jennifer W.
testimonials.text: Clean install, booties over shoes, floors covered, old equipment hauled the same day. First HVAC crew that actually paid attention to the details.

testimonials.name: Marcus D.
testimonials.text: They ran a proper Manual J on our 1920s bungalow before quoting. The last contractor had tried to sell us a unit twice too big.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: On-site within 24 hours — same-day for no-heat emergencies. Licensed tech inspects the system, explains what's happening, and quotes in writing before a wrench turns.

process.title: Design
process.description: Manual J load calc, duct evaluation, and equipment sized to your actual home. No one-size-fits-all. The wrong size is the single biggest reason HVAC systems fail early.

process.title: Install
process.description: Clean crew, booties on, drop cloths down, permits pulled, old equipment hauled. Most jobs finished in one or two days with the house livable throughout.

process.title: Maintain
process.description: Two tune-ups a year keep efficiency at peak and the manufacturer warranty valid. Members get priority response and repair pricing when something goes wrong.

chatbot.greeting: Hi — Elite HVAC's virtual assistant. Quick question to point you the right direction: new install, tune-up, or is something not working?
qualifyingQuestions: Is this a new install, a tune-up, or a repair?
If it's a repair, is the system running at all?
Approximate square footage of the home?
chatbot.customInstructions: Anchor on engineered reliability, proper load calc, and warranty depth — not lowest price. Reference Manual J, heat-pump rebates (PSE + federal 25C), NATE certification, and the 10-year labor warranty when relevant. Urgent tone for no-heat emergencies in winter; educational tone for heat-pump conversions.

persona.name: Jen
persona.title: Climate Consultant
persona.proactiveBubbleText: Hi — new install, tune-up, or something not working? I'll point you the right direction.

faqs.question: Do you install heat pumps?
faqs.answer: Yes — cold-climate heat pumps sized with a proper Manual J load calc. We handle PSE rebates and federal 25C tax credit paperwork.

faqs.question: How fast can you get out for a no-heat call?
faqs.answer: Same-day. No-heat calls are prioritized during cold snaps.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance plans?
faqs.answer: Yes — $199/year for two seasonal tune-ups, priority repair pricing, and a parts discount.

faqs.question: What's a Manual J load calc?
faqs.answer: It's the engineering calculation that sizes your HVAC to the actual heat loss/gain of your home. Skipping it is the #1 cause of early HVAC failure.
